medialive.channel.captionlanguagemapping:
Maps a captions channel to an ISO 693-2 language code (http://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2), with an optional description.

The parent of this entity is HlsGroupSettings.

medialive.channel.captionlanguagemapping.Description: The closed caption channel being described by this CaptionLanguageMapping. Each channel mapping must have a unique channel number (maximum of 4).
A three-character ISO 639-2 language code (see http://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2).
